composition_pattern: draft-slide-removal -> section-reorder -> agenda-sync -> slide-number-sync -> metric-table-update -> risk-action-cascade -> decision-notes -> appendix-publication -> locked-reference-preservation
user_task_description: A QBR deck must be converted from draft staging state into a release-ready presentation through a long ordered workflow.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Delete scratch/deprecated slides; remove draft labels; reorder slides; sync agenda and slide numbers; update KPI, risk, mitigation, decision, appendix, and speaker-note content; preserve the locked legal reference slide exactly.
atomic_scope: Single-document long-flow PowerPoint workflow with ordered slide, table, note, and locked-reference constraints.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx artifact saved to the required output path.

inspired_by.title: PowerPoint deck release pain: stale agenda, slide numbers, metrics tables, notes, and locked reference slides
